findings.description: Regex-only extraction — no LLM calls, no SQL, no file I/O, no eval/exec. Inherently safe from injection and data exfiltration vectors.

Data source: hypothesis text originates from HVR investigation loop LLM output (HypothesisResult objects). This is internal pipeline data, not external user input. The regex patterns extract only numeric values — the text itself is never executed or eval'd.
Hypothesis ID generation uses SHA-256 of text+timestamp — deterministic and collision-resistant for the 16-char hex truncation given expected volume (<10K predictions).
Verification source inference uses static _ASSET_KEYWORDS lookup table — no dynamic code execution, no external API calls.

notes: Heuristic-only module with no attack surface. Regex operations on untrusted text are safe (Python re module is not vulnerable to ReDoS in these patterns — no nested quantifiers). All patterns are anchored on literal Chinese characters followed by simple numeric capture groups. No sanitization needed for the extraction path.
